basic_details.job_title: IISc Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Institute of Science (IISc) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Administrative Assistant posts! Published under Advertisement No. R(HR)/Recruitment-2/2026 on the official IISc website, this recruitment drive offers 34 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 26 years of age and possessing a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with at least 50% marks can apply online for these vacancies. The online application process is active and will remain open until 18-06-2026. Find all details about the IISc Administrative Assistant Vacancy 2026, including eligibility, onli

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 26 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Specific relaxations include: Ex-servicemen: As per DoP&T OM dated 25.12.2025 Temporary Project Staff: One-time age relaxation for staff with a minimum of 3 years of service.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with at least 50% marks
qualification.details: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized university with a minimum of 50% marks in the qualifying degree.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level - 05 (₹29200-92300) Usual allowances as per IISc rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISc Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISc to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IISc Administrative Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISc Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IISc Administrative Assistant position is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized university with at least 50% marks to be eligible for the Administrative Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Administrative Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Administrative Assistant position is 26 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 34 vacancies for the Administrative Assistant post at the Indian Institute of Science (IISc).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for an Administrative Assistant at IISc?
faq.answer: The salary for an Administrative Assistant is as per Pay Matrix Level - 05, ranging from ₹29200 to ₹92300, plus usual allowances as per IISc rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IISc Administrative Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Job-oriented Aptitude Test, which carries 100% weightage.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IISc Administrative Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. For SC/ST, PWD, Ex-servicemen, Transgender, and women, it's ₹50 (processing fee). For other candidates, it's ₹450 (application fee) + ₹50 (processing fee).

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Administrative Assistant position at IISc?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official IISc website. The application window is from 29th May 2026 to 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will contain detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Administrative Assistant position at IISc is Full Time.
